★ — When your co-work Chuuya is being a pain in your ass, what do you do? That’s right, overstimulate the mf!

So here we are. Enjoy (･ᴗ･)

Idek if you’ll count this as hate-fucking, it’s just you using Chuuya ;D

Pretty boys crying is so agghh!
